# ♕ BYU CS 240 Chess

This project demonstrates mastery of proper software design, client/server architecture, networking using HTTP and WebSocket, database persistence, unit testing, serialization, and security.

## 10k Architecture Overview

The application implements a multiplayer chess server and a command line chess client.

[![Sequence Diagram](10k-architecture.png)](https://sequencediagram.org/index.html?presentationMode=readOnly#-jQOwjIxCKcARtIcAKDAAAyEBZIUWHME61D+s0bRdL0BjqPkaBZoqcxrL8-wcFcoEVEB--pO0htMe1AFT7Q5In6+e0vOz9nYVP9MCMmAIMyyH8Fh9tMP8hU8ORU+l4wDLiUVbeaW44n3tZeq1V5RR61lUlkf51VPZ9snC71bZ9n1-2JMdaWXUV1AxWlTAA0oLGSm86NJRgGmTjTaLs3zQWYxFiWK0933ux0U2dXJQHcfO9uKA1ztVUcCg3DohQikFAnoNIdDTdp8KMgn0yhg797m-+6dMBUBASAMd5yVk3qNTfcPtYQYT2q7MC2lIENXEjhPCWZ14MUYsrViKJ1z+GwOKDUgk0QwAAOJKg0IbTuJt8GWxtvYJUjtQ7ex0uUQBhdr7oFAV+D+nZ6jIByIQnMV8ZbhyavvFKtdRzRyZK-cGXt0C333PfeoGcAxZxzuVA+KcqpSMKCXHKWpu4FV7n1XOqim7dl7P2Oq9NBEmIbh3X0kDXSrUrgPaMQ8hqj1gQLCeE0p4zX5HPaCi9loKgcfojaSDG6yPYZYxRRcWH-2EYfURMdAwIB4WoDEMiRxyIIUySsCBo5EPCZkyJ9lcE5AADypNUOUPeADfb1FKWACpRDqlky3nYmABkxhUJzAWBo4xukoARtIAsk1wjBECCCTY8RdQoDdJyPY3xkigDVHMyCixvgDKRkqdZFwYCdGgQzZKcChYINGMsAZqhen9KVEMkZYyJnLCmTM1Znx1kgiWSAFZRFjJjA2UqLZcwdl7LCcxFW-gOAAHY3BOBQE4GIEZghwB4gANngBOQwqSYBFA8UbdpMkOiUOoatGWWZNlKgOTUd2YDSwaNYXCYpzVAbolSXw52awyVQxqfEtRiTxG0MkfytAGTU7lHTuKTOeps67xUdy4xTCc5aLLronqISq55wSVYsxIiLGt1MXvCxnVgmrycYNEeI13Hj0ntPbMvj8z+KWqWHwRq+qbQ3iItpHDonMJdhHIx-kYBMpQCyjlXJCkivhgjNAAxmDikgPknMMAMQhtJDKqOAyhkwAALwwFGeMsN6gPVRMxS0HQAArFA4AalUq-PUYtZaK2AV9oW-S5ybnDPqLmwIlleZHI8fAkWnT03tpzfc7tpgFaoICJYE+jlNiayQAkMA06+wQDnQAKR-mgAhFZ-AfLVNi8euKGYmyaMyOSPQBk0JicpUY2AEDAGnVAOAEBHJQHZW2ilbsGF1PlbvVp5QA6ls3SyjR6l72Pufa+99cwhkCNEH6kcAVY6CtZTffNqgskKJBlK72qaRH1FpYq3Kyq1qqsMbK-1bd0M6ualRmxjVDUrz6ialxZrIFj3GlNHxuY7WLSXkEpjoTGwMXfgBz+EifWCIQwXEA8QK1qkg9ABQVBwS6G4A9cDlBFNvvjYM6QwqC2iofrJ+TAaX3QBgBdVACB1wQAurpoZ5Go50batJqqQHxQsqMmBh9WnzM6aHQZjDRn0rYC0OiBz0htS6n1EZY0Ao72+aff59Dhb7Lf1-lW791KgE+BAXTCBx6Omfr9vzS1JyB0gsnf4LwD752Ltq-KRAwZYDAGwHewgeQChYpIbYorptzaW2tr0YwPbss1oeGA5reAeR6AMOkulX6A7TZqvIObKAFtxKjit5JC3N4hcfqfQwJo8lDttO6g70gn4RZO7+omqXLvXeO32OK52Elpeahlv+rnq1wly-l32BqoE9rK+NYWiDhOKyh9DxWQA)
## Modules

The application has three modules.

- **Client**: The command line program used to play a game of chess over the network.
- **Server**: The command line program that listens for network requests from the client and manages users and games.
- **Shared**: Code that is used by both the client and the server. This includes the rules of chess and tracking the state of a game.
